The Story

Started in the
kitchen at 11.

His mom worked third shift. There was nobody else to cook. So Jaylan figured it out — and never stopped.

"I didn't have a mentor. I just had curiosity and a stove."

No culinary family background. No blueprint. Just a kid who taught himself through trial, error, and a genuine love for feeding people. By the time he got to culinary school, the fundamentals clicked fast — because he'd already been doing it his way for years.

Now at 22, he's a private chef and caterer based in Huntsville — currently the Chef in Residence at Stella at Five Points — cooking for private dinners, events, and anyone who wants a real meal made with real care.

The food is soulful, approachable, and always hits. That's the whole point.

@jaydoesflavor

Chef Jaylan
How It Works

Simple as
that.

1
Reach Out

Slide into the DMs or send a message. Tell him what you're thinking — occasion, headcount, vibe. No long forms.

2
Build the Menu

He'll put together something that fits. Custom, not cookie-cutter. Dietary stuff, preferences, all that — handled.

3
Show Up & Eat

Jaylan handles everything. You just enjoy it. That's the whole deal.

What He Does

Pick your
experience.

01
Private Dinners

Jaylan comes to you. Custom menu, your kitchen or venue, no fuss. Great for date nights, family dinners, or whenever you want something special without leaving the house.

02
Event Catering

Birthdays, corporate stuff, celebrations — he's done it all. The food looks good, tastes better, and people always ask who catered.

03
Pop-Ups & Collabs

Got an idea? Let's build something. Jaylan's open to creative projects, community events, and anything that gets good food in front of people.

"Food is how I connect with people. Always has been."
— Chef Jaylan
